description: Legal record (#30) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 11r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 20 Sivan [5322 AM], based on the year mentioned on the previous page of entries. The entry was recorded in the home of Shemuʾel Dayyan in the presence of Yehuda ha-Rofe and Shelomo Feyruz, as well as members of the community overseeing the management of properties in the communal qodesh (ממונים). The case deals with a certain ʿAbd al-Mejīt b. Aharon al-Kohen, who is vacating a property in which he had been living "over Dār al-Khāzin," likely the synagogue in the Karaite neighborhood of Cairo. Some of the keywords are lost to damage but it seems that a portion of the rent is still unpaid (2 gold judad) on the house ʿAbd al-Mejīt is vacating. He also takes an oath regarding the possibility of living with his mother, who probably resides in a house given to her from the communal qodesh (l. 25). ʿAbd al-Mejīt testifies that he will not live in his mother's house while she is alive (אנה מא [..]מה סאכן פי בית אמה טול מה הי תעיש). MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#30) בפנקס בית דין קראי בקהיר (דף 11א של ייבר-ערב. I 328). מתוארך ל-20 בסיון [ה'שכ'ב]. הדיון עוסק בעבד אל-מג'יד בן אהרון הכהן, המפנה נכס שבו גר 'מעל דאר אל-ח'אזין', ככל הנראה בית הכנסת בשכונת הקראים בקהיר. חלק מהשכירות טרם שולם (2 זהב ג'דיד). עבד אל-מג'יד נשבע שלא יגור בבית אמו כל עוד היא בחיים
